/usr/bin/ar qc libbackenddbus.a CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/actions.c.o CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/guest.c.o CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/users.c.o "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/backend-dbus.c.o" CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/utils.c.o "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-display-manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-webcredentials.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-accounts.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-user.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-login1-manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-login1-seat.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-login1-user.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/gnome-screen-saver.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/gnome-session-manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/dbus-end-session-dialog.c.o" "CMakeFiles/backenddbus.dir/unity-session.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libbackenddbus.a
